case_title: JAMES C. BATEMAN PETROLEUM SERVICES,INC DBA SEMCO VS S.F. BARCELONA HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAMES C. BATEMAN PETROLEUM SERVICES,INC DBA SEMCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT S.F. BARCELONA HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION $1,576.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,596.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT S.F. BARCELONA HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT JAMES C. BATEMAN PETROLEUM SERVICES,INC DBA SEMCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO CHANDLER PROPERTIES RETURNED SIGNED.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,456.00 FILED BY S.F. BARCELONA HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT JAMES C. BATEMAN PETROLEUM SERVICES,INC DBA SEMCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
LETTER RECEIVED FROM "THE BARCELONA" AND SENT TO JUDGE COLBERT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,576.00 FILED BY JAMES C. BATEMAN PETROLEUM SERVICES,INC DBA SEMCO AS TO DEFENDANT S.F. BARCELONA HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
LETTER RECEIVED FROM KAREN COLLINGWOOD (CHANDLER) AND SENT TO COLBERT.
